title: Synthetic Bank Offer Schema
description: Schema contract for synthetic bank offers used in the Bank Offer Feed Ranking project. Defines the structure of an offer and its versioning.

offer_type.description: The specific type of the offer (e.g., 'term_deposit_reminder', 'credit_card_upgrade').

title.description: Short, human-readable title of the offer.

priority_weight.description: Business priority weight used during reranking (e.g., 1.0 is default).

active.description: Flag indicating if the offer is active and can be served.

eligibility_rules.description: Structured rule set defining customer eligibility (e.g., {'min_age': 25, 'job_types': ['admin.']}). Can also contain expression strings.

version.description: Version tag for the offer definition, useful for tracking changes over time.
